careerGoals.title: Mission
careerGoals.description: My mission is to combine academic research with practical application. I strive to discover new AI methodologies and apply them to create impactful products that solve real-world problems.

passion.title: Motivation
passion.description: I believe technology should serve humanity. My motivation comes from a desire to contribute value to the community. With Capybara, I aim to help people learn more effectively in the digital age. Research is my path to personal growth and contributing to collective knowledge.

bachelors.school: Vaasa University of Applied Sciences, VAMK

skills.title: Technical Expertise
skills.subtitle: The technologies and methodologies I use to architect intelligent solutions.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: A small selection of recent projects that showcase technical expertise and real-world impact.

capybara.name: Capybara: The Lakehouse & Scraper
capybara.description: The core of my entrepreneurial and research efforts. An ecosystem for deep, focused learning, powered by a multi-agent AI system. The scraper component gathers high-quality data to feed the learning models.

mentalCare.name: Mental-Care-AI
mentalCare.description: An AI-driven mental health support system using the LlamaIndex framework to provide real-time psychological advice, diagnose conditions, and track user progress.

fdaMa.name: FDA-MA: Paper & Repository
fdaMa.description: The official repository for a research paper, demonstrating the ability to translate complex theoretical concepts into practical, reproducible code.

dental.name: DENTAL: Image Segmentation
dental.description: Advanced AI models for dental image segmentation and analysis, showcasing expertise in computer vision for specialized medical applications.

fashion.name: AI Fashion Recommendations
fashion.description: A fashion-forward outfit recommendation platform leveraging AI to personalize style for users.

creative.name: Creative Motion
creative.description: A creative platform designed to spark innovation and imagination, built with modern technologies.

caseStudies.title: Case Studies
caseStudies.subtitle: Deep dives into projects and technical challenges.

hero.title: Huy Nguyen
hero.description: I am an AI Research Engineer and Full-stack Developer. I bridge the gap between academic research and practical application, building intelligent systems that solve real-world problems. Currently building Capybara to redefine learning.
